name: @provenance/openapi
description: OpenAPI 3.1 specifications — source of truth for all Provenance APIs

scripts.validate: redocly lint organizations.yaml products.yaml governance.yaml connectors.yaml access.yaml
scripts.bundle: redocly bundle organizations.yaml -o dist/organizations.json && redocly bundle products.yaml -o dist/products.json && redocly bundle governance.yaml -o dist/governance.json && redocly bundle connectors.yaml -o dist/connectors.json && redocly bundle access.yaml -o dist/access.json
scripts.generate:types: openapi-typescript organizations.yaml -o ../types/src/generated/organizations.ts && openapi-typescript products.yaml -o ../types/src/generated/products.ts && openapi-typescript governance.yaml -o ../types/src/generated/governance.ts && openapi-typescript connectors.yaml -o ../types/src/generated/connectors.ts && openapi-typescript access.yaml -o ../types/src/generated/access.ts
